entry.title: Stealth addresses using nostr
entry.summary: The discussion revolves around a linked project that appears to have similarities with the topic at hand. There seems to be some confusion or uncertainty regarding why responses cannot be made on a specific delving thread, despite the fact that replies have been received on it previously. This raises questions about potential hidden settings that could be preventing interaction as expected. The mention of the project and the issues with communication on the thread suggest a need for troubleshooting or clarification to ensure smooth collaboration and exchange of ideas. Further investigation into the platform's settings or reaching out for support may be necessary to resolve these communication barriers and facilitate effective dialogue regarding the project in question.
